description: Composition Green kurta made of 100% cotton fabric, has short sleeves, V-neck, yoke with stitch detailing, floral print and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look.
